commentaryData.sCommentary: Vyshak Vijaykumar to Qamran Iqbal, 1 run,
Vyshak Vijaykumar to Qamran Iqbal, no run,

Vyshak Vijaykumar to Sahil Lotra, 1 run, An accurately pitched inswinger on the stumps,  Sahil Lotra hangs in the crease to make a confident flick shot,  sending the ball towards deep fine leg for 1 run.
Vyshak Vijaykumar to Qamran Iqbal, 1 run, fast ball,  full length,  on the off stump,  hangs in the crease,  plays push,  towards the short cover for 1 run.
End of over 46 (0 runs), Jammu & Kashmir 147/4
Shreyas Gopal to Sahil Lotra, no run, Dot ball !! legbreak,  full length,  on the leg stump,  hangs in the crease,  tries to play but misses to get the bat on it.
Shreyas Gopal to Sahil Lotra, no run, Dot ball !! legbreak, good length,  on the leg stump,  Sahil Lotra hangs in the crease and tucks defensive shot toward the fielder,  who halts the ball.
Shreyas Gopal to Sahil Lotra, no run, Dot ball !! legbreak,  good length,  on the stumps,  hangs in the crease,  plays push.
Shreyas Gopal to Sahil Lotra, no run, Dot ball !! legbreak,  good length,  on the leg stump,  hangs in the crease,  plays defensive shot.
Shreyas Gopal to Sahil Lotra, no run, Dot ball !! legbreak,  good length,  on the leg stump,  Sahil Lotra hangs in the crease to the delivery,  letting it go to the keeper without offering a shot.
Shreyas Gopal to Sahil Lotra, no run, Dot ball !! legbreak,  good length,  on the leg stump,  hangs in the crease,  but decided to leave the ball at last.
End of over 45 (1 runs), Jammu & Kashmir 147/4

Vyshak Vijaykumar to Qamran Iqbal, no run, Dot ball !! inswinger,  back of length,  on the off stump,  Qamran Iqbal hangs in the crease and strives to hit uppercut,  aiming to fend it off,  but ball is too tricky to hit.

Vyshak Vijaykumar to Qamran Iqbal, no run, Dot ball !! inswinger,  good length,  on the stumps,  Qamran Iqbal hangs in the crease to the delivery,  tries to defend it with full face of the bat,  but the ball jags away at the last moment,  beating the bat.

Vyshak Vijaykumar to Qamran Iqbal, no run, Dot ball !! inswinger,  good length,  on the off stump,  Qamran Iqbal goes back and slash punch towards short cover,  but the fielder reacts promptly and blocks it right away.
